mapper.sql: id, parent_id, ancestors, module_code, module_name, module_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort, nav_visible, stateful_flag, state_field_code, context_version, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
mapper.select: select id, parent_id as parentId, module_code as moduleCode, module_name as moduleName, module_type as moduleType, sort, stateful_flag as statefulFlag, status from sys_module order by sort asc, id asc
select from sys_module where module_code = #{moduleCode} limit 1

select id, module_id, tab_scope, tab_code, tab_name, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_tab where module_id = #{moduleId} order by tab_scope asc, sort asc, id asc

select id, module_id, tab_id, field_scope, field_code, default_title, display_title, placeholder, help_text, component_type, data_path, value_type, required_flag, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_field where module_id = #{moduleId} order by field_scope asc, sort asc, id asc

select id, module_id, tab_id, field_scope, field_code, default_title, display_title, placeholder, help_text, component_type, data_path, value_type, required_flag, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_field where id = #{id}

select id, module_id, button_code, default_title, button_area, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_button where module_id = #{moduleId} order by button_area asc, sort asc, id asc

select id, module_id, state_code, state_name, sort, is_initial, is_final, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_state where module_id = #{moduleId} order by sort asc, id asc

select t.id, t.module_id, t.action_button_code, b.default_title as action_button_name, t.from_state_code, t.to_state_code, t.sort, t.status, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.note from sys_module_transition t left join sys_module_button b on b.module_id = t.module_id and b.button_code = t.action_button_code where t.module_id = #{moduleId} order by t.sort asc, t.id asc
